response_quality.message_zh: 检测到大量相同答案，疑似直线作答或敷衍，建议重新认真测评。
response_quality.message_en: Many identical answers detected (possible straight-lining or rushing). Please retake carefully.

response_quality.message_zh: 中立选项过多，可能未做明确选择，建议认真重新作答。
response_quality.message_en: Too many neutral choices detected; please retake and make clearer selections.

data_quality_notes: 你的 Holland 得分区分度较低（各类型分数接近），三码可能不能清晰代表你的兴趣偏好，建议结合日常经历进一步验证。/ Your Holland scores show low differentiation (types are close together), so the three-letter code may not clearly represent your interests. Validate against your daily experiences.
检测到大量相同答案，疑似直线作答或敷衍，建议重新认真测评。 / Many identical answers detected (possible straight-lining or rushing). Please retake carefully.
中立选项过多，可能未做明确选择，建议认真重新作答。 / Too many neutral choices detected; please retake and make clearer selections.

Gallup 模拟量表 A/B 双侧映射已完整（双侧计分题 98.3%，34/34 个主题参与计分）。结果为探索性参考，非官方 CliftonStrengths 报告。/ Gallup simulation has full A/B mapping (dual-side 98.3%, 34/34 themes scored). Results are for exploration—not an official CliftonStrengths report.
